Quality Education.reason: The course is fundamentally about improving "learning assessment" (學習評量) and "educational tests" (教育測驗), which are core components of ensuring effective learning outcomes (Target 4.1).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course covers "aptitude tests" (性向測驗), which are tools used in career counseling and personnel selection to help achieve productive employment and decent work (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course builds capacity for scientific research through "statistical analysis" and "SPSS實作", which aligns with the goal of enhancing scientific research capabilities (Target 9.5).
evidence: Possession of professional knowledge and ethics in education research law

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course's focus on test validity and ethics is crucial for creating fair assessments, which helps ensure equal opportunity and reduce inequalities of outcome (Target 10.3).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The principles of evaluation and assessment taught in the course contribute to developing more effective, accountable, and transparent institutions (Target 16.6) within the education sector.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course builds statistical capacity and teaches methods for creating reliable measurements, supporting the goal of increasing high-quality, reliable data for monitoring progress (Target 17.18, 17.19).
evidence: 能編制、分析及運用教育測驗的能力(包含統計與分析)
